zh.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge於1395年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。他與Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年在他的家鄉享年20歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge于1395年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。他与Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年在他的家乡享年20岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge was born in 1395, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge est né en 1395, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge wurde 1395 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 20 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge è nato il nel 1395 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.Suffolk, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bokingeは1395年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた。イギリスイギリススフォルクでLady Bokinge of Ashbokingeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に故郷で20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge(은)는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 그의 고향에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge nasceu em 1395, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1415, em sua cidade natal, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge родился в 1395 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Bokinge nació en 1395, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 20 años.
